Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Analytic Fog Rendering with Volumetric Primitives (2025) 76 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Apache Otava 70 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Entomologists use a particle accelerator to image ants at scale 86 upvotes, 11 comments
  4. Payphone Go 284 upvotes, 60 comments
  5. TypeScript 6.0 RC 63 upvotes, 10 comments
  6. CT Scans of Health Wearables 168 upvotes, 38 comments
  7. Ada 2022 92 upvotes, 18 comments
  8. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 428 upvotes, 124 comments
  9. Astra: An open-source observatory control software 76 upvotes, 18 comments
  10. Triplet Superconductor 42 upvotes, 8 comments
  11. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 242 upvotes, 79 comments
  12. this css proves me human 84 upvotes, 23 comments
  13. Good Bad ISPs 88 upvotes, 25 comments
  14. Art Bits from HyperCard 38 upvotes, 9 comments
  15. C# Strings Silently Kill Your SQL Server Indexes in Dapper 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  16. The Shady World of IP Leasing 28 upvotes, 7 comments
  17. A tool that removes censorship from open-weight LLMs 94 upvotes, 36 comments
  18. Open Camera is a FOSS camera app for Android 191 upvotes, 89 comments
  19. Show HN: Reconstruct any image using primitive shapes, runs in-browser via WASM 17 upvotes, 4 comments
  20. Workers who love ‘synergizing paradigms’ might be bad at their jobs 477 upvotes, 278 comments
  21. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 213 upvotes, 123 comments
  22. Show HN: Claude-replay – A video-like player for Claude Code sessions 53 upvotes, 24 comments
  23. Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions 636 upvotes, 423 comments
  24. Math Notepad 22 upvotes, 8 comments
  25. The worst acquisition in history, again 78 upvotes, 55 comments
  26. Anthropic, please make a new Slack 146 upvotes, 118 comments
  27. Global warming has accelerated significantly 897 upvotes, 886 comments
  28. The disappearing Form D (2018) 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs 32 upvotes, 40 comments
  30. Multifactor (YC F25) Is Hiring an Engineering Lead 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 7:30am, 7 March 2026. Source here.
